name: Alek Tobias
title: Expert Full Stack Engineer
Solution Architect
AI-Powered Coding Specialist
Product-Oriented Thinker
summary: Expert Full Stack Engineer & Solution Architect with 8+ years of experience delivering mission-critical systems for global Tier-1 clients. I specialize in bridging the gap between technical complexity and business growth, powered by a relentless product-owner mindset. I am obstinate about making things work, writing exceptionally clean code, and serving as a force multiplier for my team through mentorship and architectural leadership. Deeply specialized in the JavaScript ecosystem (Next.js, Node.js, Bun) and Cloud Infrastructure (AWS, Terraform).

interests.name: Martial Arts & Strategic Fortitude
interests.description: My dedication to Mixed Martial Arts (MMA) and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ) is a testament to mental fortitude. It is a laboratory for staying analytical and strategic under pressure, proving that technique and leverage consistently triumph over raw strength.
items: Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu: The chess match of body mechanics.
MMA: Adapting to dynamic and chaotic scenarios.

interests.name: Sustainability, Culinary Arts & Community
interests.description: I embrace a grounded lifestyle that reconnects technical complexity with environmental balance. From observing ecosystems to the creative act of cooking, I find joy in transforming raw elements into shared moments of connection.
items: Gardening & Ecosystems: Patience and systemic understanding.
Culinary Arts: The creative act of nourishing community.
Balance: Staying connected to the environment.

interests.name: Complex Puzzles & Cognitive Challenges
interests.description: I thrive on cognitive challenges and the 'mechanics of why.' Whether deciphering complex systems, solving spatial puzzles, or unraveling strategic mysteries, I am driven by the investigative process and the satisfaction of overcoming architectural obstacles.
items: Spatial Logic: Mechanical puzzles and Rubik's cubes.
Deep Foresight: Strategy games that require investigative thinking.
Curiosity: A lifelong drive to understand and repair complex systems.
